parameters-en.Blend: Controls the blend between the detuned signal and the dry signal. At 0%, no detuning is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Detune: Controls the amount of detuning, from -50 cents to +50 cents. Extreme values add more depth or intensity to the chorus-like sound.
parameters-en.Low Cut: Applies a low cut (or high pass) filter to the detuning, letting you remove the effected signal below a certain frequency.
parameters-en.High Cut: Applies a high cut (or low pass) filter to the detuning, letting you remove the effected signal above a certain frequency.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
